lineage: The Ecclesiastical History of Socrates Scholasticus.
After the Synod, on the Death of Alexander, Athanasius is constituted Bishop of Alexandria.

ccel.title: NPNF2-02. Socrates and Sozomenus Ecclesiastical Histories

source.title: NPNF2-02. Socrates and Sozomenus Ecclesiastical Histories

title: After the Synod, on the Death of Alexander, Athanasius is constituted Bishop of Alexandria.

source.title: NPNF2-02. Socrates and Sozomenus Ecclesiastical Histories

verses.book: The Ecclesiastical History of Socrates Scholasticus.
verses.text: A little after this, Alexander bishop of Alexandria having died, Athanasius was set over that church.

verses.book: The Ecclesiastical History of Socrates Scholasticus.
verses.text: Rufinus relates, that this [Athanasius] when quite a boy, played with others of his own age at a sacred game: this was an imitation of the priesthood and the order of consecrated persons.

verses.book: The Ecclesiastical History of Socrates Scholasticus.
verses.text: In this game therefore Athanasius was allotted the episcopal chair, and each of the other lads personated either a presbyter or a deacon.

verses.book: The Ecclesiastical History of Socrates Scholasticus.
verses.text: The children engaged in this sport on the day in which the memory of the martyr and bishop Peter was celebrated.

verses.book: The Ecclesiastical History of Socrates Scholasticus.
verses.text: Now at that time Alexander bishop of Alexandria happening to pass by, observed the play in which they were engaged, and having sent for the children, enquired from them the part each had been assigned in the game, conceiving that something might be portended by that which had been done.

verses.book: The Ecclesiastical History of Socrates Scholasticus.
verses.text: He then gave directions that the children should be taken to the church, and instructed in learning, but especially Athanasius; and having afterwards ordained him deacon on his becoming of adult age, he brought him to Nicæa to assist him in the disputations there when the Synod was convened.

verses.book: The Ecclesiastical History of Socrates Scholasticus.
verses.text: This account of Athanasius Rufinus has given in his own writings; nor is it improbable that it took place, for many transactions of this kind have often occurred.

verses.book: The Ecclesiastical History of Socrates Scholasticus.
verses.text: Concerning this matter it will suffice to have said the above.
